=Index of types=

|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\C|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="client_notif"| type Notif.ARG.client_notif >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Notif.ARG >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="content"| type Page.content >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Page >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~An abstract type describing the content of a page
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="current_user"| type Current_user.current_user >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Current_user >>~]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\E|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="error"| type Fcm_notif.Response.Results.error >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Response.Results >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Sum type to represent errors~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\I|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="id"| type User.id >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Type alias to <<a_api subproject="server" | type Types.User.id >> to allow to use <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~User~.id>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="id"| type Types.Group.id >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Types.Group >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Type representing a group ~I~D
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="id"| type Types.User.id >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Types.User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Type representing a user ~I~D
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="id"| type Group.id >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Group >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Type alias to <<a_api subproject="server" | type Types.Group.id >> to allow to use <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~Group~.id>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="info"| type Types.Action_link_key.info >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Types.Action_link_key >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Type representing information about the action link key
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\K|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="key"| type Request_cache.Cache_sig.key >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Request_cache.Cache_sig >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~The type of the key
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="key"| type Notif.ARG_SIMPLE.key >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Notif.ARG_SIMPLE >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="key"| type Notif.ARG.key >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Notif.ARG >>~]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\L|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="local_calendar"| type Date.local_calendar >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Date >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Type representing a local calendar~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\N|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="notification"| type Notif.ARG_SIMPLE.notification >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Notif.ARG_SIMPLE >>~]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\S|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="server_notif"| type Notif.ARG.server_notif >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Notif.ARG >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="sms_error"| type Connect_phone.sms_error >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Connect_phone >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="sms_error_core"| type Connect_phone.sms_error_core >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Connect_phone >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~To be used for signalling errors with ~S~M~S transmission
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="success"| type Fcm_notif.Response.Results.success >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Response.Results >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~The type representing a success result~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\T|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="t"| type User.t >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Type alias to <<a_api subproject="server" | type Types.User.t >> to allow to use <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~User~.t>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="t"| type Types.Group.t >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Types.Group >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Type representing a group~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="t"| type Types.User.t >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Types.User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Type representing a user~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="t"| type Platform.t >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Platform >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Platform type~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="t"| type Lib.Email_or_phone.Almost.t >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Lib.Email_or_phone.Almost >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="t"| type Lib.Email_or_phone.t >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Lib.Email_or_phone >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="t"| type Group.t >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Group >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Type alias to <<a_api subproject="server" | type Types.Group.t >> to allow to use <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~Group~.t>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="t"| type Fcm_notif.Response.Results.t >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Response.Results >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~The type representing a result~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="t"| type Fcm_notif.Response.t >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Response >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~The type representing a ~F~C~M response
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="t"| type Fcm_notif.Options.Priority.t >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Options.Priority >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Priority of the message~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="t"| type Fcm_notif.Options.t >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Options >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~The type representing an option~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="t"| type Fcm_notif.Data.PhoneGap.Visibility.t >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Data.PhoneGap.Visibility >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="t"| type Fcm_notif.Data.PhoneGap.Priority.t >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Data.PhoneGap.Priority >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~Maximum>> means the notification will be displayed on the screen
                above all views during ~2 or ~3 seconds~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="t"| type Fcm_notif.Data.PhoneGap.Action.t >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Data.PhoneGap.Action >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="t"| type Fcm_notif.Data.PhoneGap.Style.t >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Data.PhoneGap.Style >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="t"| type Fcm_notif.Data.t >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Data >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~The type representing a data payload~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="t"| type Fcm_notif.Notification.t >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Notification >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~The type representing a notification
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\V|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="value"| type Request_cache.Cache_sig.value >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Request_cache.Cache_sig >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~The type of the value
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\W|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="wrapper"| type Core_db.wrapper >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Core_db >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Setup a wrapper function which is used each time a connection is
   acquired~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\Y|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="y"| type Lib.Email_or_phone.Almost.y >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Lib.Email_or_phone.Almost >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="y"| type Lib.Email_or_phone.y >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Lib.Email_or_phone >>~]||
\\
